findings.description: No heading structure is used in the HTML. The document has no h1, h2, or other heading elements. 'Ongoing Activities:' could reasonably be an h1 or h2 heading but is rendered as a plain paragraph.
findings.evidence:
PDF starts with 'Ongoing Activities:' as a section title. HTML renders it as '

Ongoing Activities:

' with no heading tags.

findings.description: The HTML contains nested duplicate <main> elements, though the content itself is not duplicated.
findings.evidence: HTML has '<main>' inside another '<main>' element. Content appears only once, so this is a structural duplication of the container element rather than content duplication.
